items.title: JPMorgan Taps New COO To Unify AI And Data For Investors
items.description: JPMorgan Chase has appointed Guy Halamish as Chief Operating Officer for its commercial and investment bank. Halamish will oversee a broad overhaul of the bank's AI and data strategy across payments, global banking, securities, and markets. The move signals a push to embed AI, cleaner data, and tighter governance into JPMorgan's core operations. For investors watching NYSE:JPM, this appointment comes with the stock last closing at $302.55 and a mixed return profile. The share price is up...

items.title: Assessing JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
items.description: Recent performance snapshot JPMorgan Chase (JPM) has recently seen mixed share performance, with a slight 1 day return decline and a larger pullback over the past week and month, while the past 3 months remain modestly positive. For longer term holders, the stock’s total return over the past year, 3 years, and 5 years has been positive, even as the year to date performance sits in negative territory. items.title: JPMorgan builds $2.93 billion stake in health care stock
items.description: JPMorgan Chase just planted a massive $2.93 billion flag in perhaps one of the hottest corners of the market. items.title: JP Morgan Increases Target Price on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $21
items.description: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is one of the 10 Best Bank Stocks to Buy in 2026. On February 9, JPMorgan analyst Andrew Dietrich raised his target price on Huntington Bancshares by 5.0% to $21 (from $20) and kept his Overweight call on the stock. This TP update comes as JPMorgan updated its models for large-cap […]
